calendar.matters:
Petition To Close Insolvent Estate And For Order Of Finsl Discharge.
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Special Administrator). Robert Rothman for Angela Horne (Respondent). Sheila Robello Cedric Horne (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it reviewed the petition and response/objection, that it had been two years since the Decedent died and that no petition for probate from Angela Horne had been filed. Discussions were held regarding the appropriateness of the deed/transfer of the property and the request/subpeona for medical records. The Court granted access to the medical records. The Court granted the petition appointing Cedric Horne as the administrator of the estate of Pink Horne, Jr., (subject to review of the order). Bond will be waived until the inventory and appraisal is filed. Mr. Der will submit the order discharging Debra Dolch as the Special Administrator.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-05-2009 Continued To May-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Continued To May-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Special Administrator). Sheila Robello for Cedric Horne (Petitioner).

Mr. Der reported that he received the medical records. Ms. Robello stated that she reviewed the documents, and that her Client wanted to proceed with the Petition for Probate and continue discovery. In addition, Ms. Robello stated that there were issues as to whether there were any assets, how the estate was handled prior to the Decedent's death and the legitimacy of the transfer of the property. Furthermore, she stated that Ms. Dolch (the Special Administrator) no longer wanted to proceed and requested a 30 day continuance to provide notice and do publication. The matter was continued to May 05, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a hearing on Ms. Robello's petition and the discharge of Ms. Dolch.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Jackson.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2009 Continued To Apr-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Continued To Mar-25-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-28-2009 Continued To Feb-25-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arthur Park for Cedric Horne (Petitioner).

Mr. Park stated that Mr. Der was to appear and stipulate to a 90 day continuance. In addition, he stated that they were waiting for discovery to be completed and for the results on the subpoenaed records. The Court referred to the Examiner's notes with regard to the lack of filing of the proof of service and the filing of the proof of publication. Mr. Park stated that if there were no assets in the estate, that he would drop the petition. The matter was continued to February 25, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on discovery and for status on the petition for probate. The Court stated that a declaration would be required if there was no return on the subpoena.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy M. Svahlin.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Continued To Jan-28-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-04-2008 Continued To Jul-30-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Continued To Jun-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Appointment Of Special Administrator
Off Calendar Mar-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robelo for and with Cedric Horne (Son) and Suzette Taylor Horne (Daughter). Michelle Horne (Daughter In Law) also present. Robert Rothman for Angela Horne (Wife).

Counsel presented argument as to the whether the children of the decedent were entitled to one third each interest of the real property. After hearing oral argument, the Court granted the petition, but will appoint a professional fiduciary which is to be agreed upon by the parties. The professional fiduciary will have the authority to determine initiating litigation and the estate will be responsible for fees and costs. Ms. Robelo will prepare the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Allen.

Petition For Appointment Of Special Administrator
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Continued To Mar-28-08 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 202
